market_context:

title_variants: Park in Style + Relax in Our Quiet Guesthouse
Unbeatable Value - Free Parking & Charming Accommodations (£92.2)
analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to the perfect retreat with our charming guesthouse, perfect for couples and families alike. We offer a serene and comfortable atmosphere, ideal for those seeking a relaxing getaway. Our cozy spaces can accommodate up to 4 guests, providing ample room for relaxation and rejuvenation. Take advantage of the free parking available on-site, making it easy to enjoy the local area without worrying about transportation costs. With a short commute to nearby attractions, you'll have plenty of opportunities to explore and make unforgettable memories. Enjoy a comfortable and relaxing stay in our delightful guesthouse, where you can unwind and recharge.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space would greatly enhance the guest experience
A laundry facility would be a convenient addition for guests
A TV or entertainment system would be a welcome amenity
analysis.photo_order_rec: Showcase the cozy living area as the cover photo, highlighting the comfortable seating and warm décor.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate (£92.2) is 47% below the median in your market (£175.00), which may indicate a pricing issue.
Your occupancy (17.4%) is 41.3 percentage points below the median occupancy (58.7%) in your market, suggesting that your pricing or listing might not be effectively reaching potential guests.
With a review count of 438, your credibility and perceived quality are high, but could be even stronger with a more engaging title and description.
analysis.outreach_hook: You have a significant pricing gap, with your rate 47% below the median, but only 17.4% of your occupancy calendar is booked.
